title: NIT AP Notification 2026 - Apply Online for 11 Adhoc Faculty Posts
description: National Institute of Technology Andhra Pradesh (NIT Andhra Pradesh) has declared the official notification for 21026. To fill up the 11 vacancies for Adhoc Faculty Jobs. Candidates who have qualified in the B.E/ B.Tech, M.E/ M.Tech in Electrical Engineering, Civil Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, and Ph.D can grab this chance and apply for the NIT AP Notification 2026 . Here we included more details about the age limit, selection process, salarystructure, education details, applciation f...
